My Anti-Aging
Ritual

The products I actually use every single day
A Note From Amanda

I get asked about my skin constantly. And honestly, I get it. At 36, I am more committed to natural anti-aging than I have ever been. Not because I am afraid of getting older. But because I believe the body is a direct reflection of what you put in and on it.

Everything I am sharing here is something I personally use. No fillers, no sponsored opinions. These are the products sitting on my bathroom counter right now. I have done the research so you do not have to.

Use my codes where listed. They will save you money and support what I do here.

01  /  The Foundation Serum

Oliveda F59 Hydroxytyrosol
Corrective Serum

This is my non-negotiable. Hydroxytyrosol is one of the most potent antioxidants found in nature. It comes from the olive tree and it works at a cellular level. I have watched it change the texture and tone of my skin over time in a way nothing else has. It absorbs completely, layers under everything, and I notice immediately when I skip it.

Shop F59 Corrective Serum
02  /  Nature's Botox

Wildflower Plant Magic
Bee Venom Roller

I call this my natural Botox. Bee venom signals the skin to produce collagen and elastin by mimicking a mild sting response. It sounds intense. It is not. It feels like a gentle tingle and the results over time are real. I use this on my forehead and around my eyes. The roller applicator makes it easy and precise. Use code AMANDAKNOX for a discount.

Shop Bee Venom Roller
Use code AMANDAKNOX at checkout
03  /  The Skin Reset

Curativa
Advanced Hypochlorous Skin Spray

Hypochlorous acid is something your own immune system produces naturally to fight inflammation and bacteria. This spray is a stabilized version of it and I use it on clean skin before anything else goes on. It calms redness, tightens pores, and preps your skin to actually absorb what comes next. It is one of those products that sounds simple and does more than you expect. Use code AMANDAKNOX for 20% off sitewide.

Shop Curativa Skin Spray
Use code AMANDAKNOX for 20% off sitewide
04  /  The Device

Bon Charge
Red Light Therapy Mask

Red light therapy has years of clinical research behind it. It stimulates cellular repair, boosts collagen synthesis, and reduces inflammation at a level topicals alone cannot reach. I use this 10 minutes a day while I am doing something else. It has become part of my non-negotiable morning or evening wind-down. The Bon Charge mask is one of the best on the market at this price point. Use code AMANDAKNOX for 15% off.

Shop Bon Charge Red Light Mask
Use code AMANDAKNOX for 15% off
05  /  Overnight Work

SEALD Wellness
Face + Forehead Tape

We create expression lines by repeating the same facial movements for decades. SEALD tape gently holds the skin smooth while you sleep so those lines cannot deepen overnight. I was skeptical at first. Now I wear it every single night. It works with your skincare, not against it. Use code AMANDAKNOX20 for 20% off.

Use code AMANDAKNOX20 for 20% off

This is the whole ritual.

No injections. No harsh chemicals. No complicated 12-step systems.
Just things that actually work, rooted in the intelligence of nature.
